# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type BodyPayload = {
  content?: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
};

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', {
      status: 405,
      headers: { Allow: 'POST' },
    });
  }

  let body: BodyPayload;
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as BodyPayload;
  } catch {
    return new Response('Invalid JSON body', { status: 400 });
  }

  const content = body?.content;
  const userHeaders = body?.headers ?? {};

  const safeHeaders = new Headers();
  safeHeaders.set('content-type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
  safeHeaders.set('cache-control', 'no-store');

  const blockedHeaders = new Set([
    'content-length',
    'transfer-encoding',
    'connection',
    'keep-alive',
    'upgrade',
    'proxy-authenticate',
    'proxy-authorization',
    'te',
    'trailer',
    'host',
  ]);

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
    const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
    if (blockedHeaders.has(normalizedKey)) continue;
    if (typeof value !== 'string') continue;
    safeHeaders.set(key, value);
  }

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    start(controller) {
      if (Array.isArray(content)) {
        for (const chunk of content) {
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(String(chunk)));
        }
      } else {
        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(String(content ?? '')));
      }
      controller.close();
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: safeHeaders,
  });
}
